items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Lee Mayberry. Arkansas PG was May of May/Day fame. Drafted 23rd by MIL in 92. Was steady backup PG as a pro w/MIL & VAN thru 99. Not a scorer but didn't make mistakes. Averaged between 4.6 & 5.8 ppg his 1st 6 seasons. Now, coaches HS ball.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Lee Mayberry. Arkansas PG was May of May/Day fame. Drafted 23rd by MIL in 92. Was steady backup PG as a pro w/MIL & VAN thru 99. Not a scorer but didn't make mistakes. Averaged between 4.6 & 5.8 ppg his 1st 6 seasons. Now, coaches HS ball.
